---
title: "Eurobarometer Analysis"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(broom)
library(modelsummary)
```

# Load the data

```{r}
eb_data <- read_dta("eurobarometer_trends.dta")
```

# View the data


```{r}
glimpse(eb_data)
```


```{r}
dim(eb_data)
summary(eb_data)
```
